form.formComment: Racing well recently. Most recently came from midfield and won by a nose at Le Croisé-Laroche April 4 over 2500m on a rain affected track defeating Lhommaize carrying 57.5kg at $6.30. form.formComment: Recent form sound. At the latest run tried to lead throughout but was claimed late 2nd of 13 at Le Croisé-Laroche on March 20 over 2500m, head behind Mister Power carrying 55.5kg at $4.40. Before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 16 at Senonnes-Pouancé on March 13 over 2300m, on a wet track; nose behind Kumran carrying 57.5kg at $6. Poised to win after a narrow defeat last time.
